MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Issarah Cabrera.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nelson Wilson is present.
Attorney Megan Knize representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-15-2013 is vacated. JPT Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
